theme: 3-hafta BOSS — multi-servis compose stack (web + cache + volume + registry)

tasks.title: Stack papkasi
tasks.why: Capstone: ko'p-servisli stack. Avval tartibli papka.
steps: Ishchi papkangga o't:  cd ~/devops/days/day-21/work
mkdir -p stack && cd stack

tasks.title: Ilova kodi (app.py)
steps: stack/app.py yarat: GET so'rovga 'Salom konteynerdan!' javob bersin (8080-port)
1-qator print('App ishga tushdi', flush=True) bo'lsin

tasks.title: Dockerfile
steps: stack/Dockerfile:  FROM python:3-alpine / WORKDIR /app / COPY app.py . / EXPOSE 8080 / CMD ["python","app.py"]

tasks.title: Day-16: image qur
steps: stack papkасида:  docker build -t d21web .

tasks.title: Day-15/17: ishga tushir
steps: docker run -d --name d21web -p 8091:8080 d21web
curl -s localhost:8091 > run.txt  →  keyin:  docker rm -f d21web  (port bo'shasin)

tasks.title: Day-19: registry uchun tag
steps: docker tag d21web localhost:5000/d21web

tasks.title: Multi-servis compose
steps: stack/docker-compose.yml yoz (MISSION'dagidek):
web (build: ., ports 8091:8080, depends_on cache) + cache (image: redis:alpine, volume) + volumes:

tasks.title: Stackни ko'tar
steps: stack papkасида:  docker compose -p d21boss up -d --build
Tekshir:  docker compose -p d21boss ps  (2 servis: web, cache)

tasks.title: Web javob beryaptimi
tasks.why: Stack ko'tarilgach web ilova ishlashini tekshirish.
steps: curl -s localhost:8091 > stack/web.txt

tasks.title: Web → cache (nom bilan)
tasks.why: Day-18: web servisi 'cache' ni NOM bilan topadi (compose tarmog'i).
steps: web ичidan cache'ni hal qil (DNS):
docker compose -p d21boss exec -T web python -c "import socket;print(socket.gethostbyname('cache'))" > stack/net.txt
tasks.expect: net.txt — cache'ning IP manzili (web uni nom bilan topdi)

tasks.title: Cache (redis) ishlayaptimi
tasks.why: redis servisi ma'lumot saqlay olishini tekshirish.
steps: docker compose -p d21boss exec -T cache redis-cli set boss ok
docker compose -p d21boss exec -T cache redis-cli get boss > stack/cache.txt

tasks.title: O'zing: stack qur va ko'tar
tasks.why: Qadam YO'Q — butun ko'nikmangni o'zing qo'lla.
tasks.expect: work/solo/ да o'z ilovang (app.py+Dockerfile) + 2-servisli docker-compose.yml (web + redis) yozib, 'd21solo' loyiha nomi bilan ko'tar (up -d --build). web 8093-portда.

tasks.title: O'zing: stackни tekshir
tasks.why: Qadam YO'Q — o'z stack'ing javobini ol.
tasks.expect: O'z stack'ingdagi web javobini work/solo-web.txt ga saqla (curl localhost:8093).

tasks.title: Registry'ga joyla
tasks.why: Day-19: web image'ни registry'ga push (deploy uchun tayyor).
steps: Lokal registry:  docker run -d -p 5000:5000 --name d21reg registry:2
Push:  docker push localhost:5000/d21web

tasks.title: 3-hafta xulosasi
steps: Docker'да o'rgangan 3 ta eng muhim narsani + multi-servis stack qanday ishlashini ustozга ayt
